title: Jellie Cake
body:
This resource pack retextures cake to a jellie themed one, nice and easy! 

Includes different models for all 7 slices, additionally you can put a candle on it and it will keep its texture.

Pack works for 1.21.4, and probably works on previous version as well, but feel free to reach me out if there's any versions this pack doesnt work in.

That's it! Hope you like it Feel free to share your screenshots with me! tag me @_InkGhoul on twitter or ink-ghoul on tumblr.
